summary: Decent soundboard recording but a short, sub‑par set with lukewarm vocals and a few bright moments.
review: The board sounds pretty good, though the reviewer notes it could use a touch of reverb to soften the dry edge. Musically the show is described as one of the shortest and less than average, with marginal Jerry vocals and a disappointing ending to the R&R > One More Saturday Night sequence, yet the reviewer does highlight several enjoyable segments such as Bertha > Good Lovin', Candyman, El Paso, Let It Grow, and Not Fade Away > Morning Dew.

ai_rating.rationale: The single review rates the show 2 stars and calls it below average, while noting a decent soundboard; this yields a low overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear board recording but slightly dry; reviewer suggests adding a little reverb to soften it up.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is noted as unusually short and less than average, with a weak ending to the R&R > One More Saturday Night sequence.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals are described as only marginal tonight.
